data.title: 国际服S2赛季补偿公告
data.summary: Here's an announcement regarding Tactical Challenge Season 2 Group Re-formation and future actions.
data.body:
Here's an announcement regarding Tactical Challenge Season 2 Group Re-formation and future actions.
We are sorry for any inconvenience caused and will do our best to provide you with a better solution.

More details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/98023

Tactical Challenge Season Reset Compensation: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/98037
